// M.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
partial class M
{
    public static global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::Dst, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError> TryMap(global::Src src)
    {
        if (src is null) return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::Dst, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Failure(new global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError("mapping.source.null", "(root)"));
        try
        {
            Validate(src);
            var __dst = new global::Dst(
                Id: src.Id
            );
            Audit(src, __dst);
            return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::Dst, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Success(__dst);
        }
        catch (global::System.Exception ex)
        {
            return global::ZeroAlloc.Results.Result<global::Dst, global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError>.Failure(new global::ZeroAlloc.Mapping.MappingError("mapping.constructor.threw", "(root)", ex.Message));
        }
    }
}
